_description: Domain synergy graph. When a dome's score in domain X improves, connected domains also improve proportionally. Edge weight (0-1) indicates the strength of the downstream effect. Based on published evidence on social determinants of health, housing-first outcomes, and integrated service delivery research.

_sources.housing_health: Maqbool, N. et al. (2015). The Impacts of Affordable Housing on Health. NHCHC.
_sources.nutrition_health: Gundersen, C. & Ziliak, J. (2015). Food Insecurity and Health Outcomes. Health Affairs.
_sources.education_economics: Autor, D. (2014). Skills, Education, and the Rise of Earnings Inequality. Science.
_sources.safety_health: Sharkey, P. (2018). Uneasy Peace: The Great Crime Decline. Norton.
_sources.housing_education: Brennan, M. (2011). The Impacts of Affordable Housing on Education. NHCHC.
_sources.economics_nutrition: Coleman-Jensen, A. et al. (2023). Household Food Security in the US. USDA ERS.

edges.evidence: Stable housing reduces ER visits 40-60%; PSH reduces Medicaid costs 12%
Housing stability improves school attendance 10-15%; reduces grade retention
Housing-first reduces victimization risk; neighborhood stability reduces crime
Stable address enables job search, maintains employment; reduces presenteeism
Residential stability builds social networks; tenure enables civic participation
Medicaid expansion increased labor force participation 3-6% in expansion states
Untreated health conditions are leading cause of school absence and dropout
Healthcare navigation connects to WIC/SNAP; chronic disease management requires nutrition
Mental health treatment restores agency; chronic pain management enables participation
Income is primary determinant of housing stability; $1000 income increase reduces homelessness risk 2%
Income is strongest predictor of food security; EITC reduces food insecurity 5-10%
$10K income increase associated with 1-2 year life expectancy gain at lower incomes
Economic stability enables educational investment; reduces child labor and dropout
Financial stability enables civic participation; poverty isolates
Each year of education increases earnings 8-13%; bachelor's degree premium is 65%
Education gradient in mortality: 4-year degree associated with 7+ years additional life expectancy
Education expands agency and life options; strongest predictor of self-reported meaning
Educational attainment predicts civic engagement, voting, and volunteering
Food insecurity doubles risk of diabetes, depression; adequate nutrition reduces chronic disease
School breakfast programs improve test scores 15-25%; hunger impairs cognition directly
Malnutrition reduces productivity; childhood nutrition predicts adult earnings
Violence exposure causes PTSD, depression; safe neighborhoods enable outdoor activity
Neighborhood violence reduces school test scores equivalent to missing 1 year of school
Crime reduces property values, business investment; violence reduces labor force participation
Safety is prerequisite for social cohesion; crime erodes trust and civic participation
Car access is strongest predictor of employment for welfare recipients; transit access expands job search radius 60%
3.6M Americans miss medical appointments due to transportation; non-emergency medical transport saves $2400/year
Transportation access predicts college enrollment and completion for low-income students
Broadband access is prerequisite for modern education; digital divide maps to achievement gap
Internet access required for 80% of job applications; digital literacy predicts earnings
Telehealth requires broadband; digital health tools improve chronic disease management
Air pollution causes 100K+ US deaths/year; lead exposure reduces IQ 3-5 points; water contamination causes chronic illness
Environmental hazards reduce housing value; flooding/toxics make housing uninhabitable
Green space increases social cohesion; environmental justice drives community organizing
Criminal record reduces callbacks 50%; occupational licensing bars 30% of jobs; immigration status determines work authorization
Eviction record reduces housing access; criminal record bars public housing; legal aid prevents 70% of evictions
Legal status determines Medicaid eligibility; disability benefits require legal advocacy; medical debt requires legal protection
Felony disenfranchisement removes civic voice; immigration enforcement fragments communities
Social isolation mortality risk equivalent to smoking 15 cigarettes/day; community ties reduce depression 40%
Social cohesion is strongest neighborhood-level predictor of reduced violence
Belonging and recognition are prerequisites for meaning-making; isolation destroys purpose
Sense of purpose associated with 15% lower mortality; reduces allostatic load
Purpose drives contribution; meaning-making builds social bonds
